message: What’s that, is it the detective?
That’s not how you say it, right?
No, sorry, I thought it was Ariana.
I wonder where that guy went!
It's been like that the whole time. Not a single word.
It seems like a brief moment of rest to recover energy for the midnight ruckus. The inside of the bar is surprisingly quiet, with no customers in sight.
A bartender with too much time on his hands, me and.
I wonder if he's worried about
doesn't seem to be around. If he wanted to hide, there are plenty of places to do so,
but his attitude doesn’t seem like an act.
but it seems the situation with
is really taking a toll on him. He seems to have lost even more weight.
He looks so restless that it’s painful to watch; it’s like he can’t even focus on work.
Has he gone to the apartment?
But it seemed like she didn’t know.
No way, if Ariana hasn’t contacted me, it has to be because she got caught by Gloria.
I’ve been really distracted by thoughts of Ariana and messing up at work. It’s so frustrating.
Ariana hasn’t reached out. Did you get any news from the detective?
Ariana is mad at me. That’s why.
But if it’s not at Gloria’s, where in the world could she be?
If something happens to Ariana, what am I supposed to do?
But how can I think of anything good when there’s been no contact?
What should I do? What should I do?
I dislike that guy, but I hope Ariana is with him.
please stop, I don’t want to hear it.
There’s no way she isn’t hiding something. Otherwise, this doesn’t make any sense.
I thought I'd go talk to that woman and see if I could get her to introduce me to Ariana.
But, you know, at least for now, isn't it true that Gloria doesn't even know where she is?
Don't you think they don't know their whereabouts?
How would I know that! They might be holding her captive in some hotel. Right, that's an angle to consider.
They're definitely holding Ariana captive. If that's not the case,
It seems they want to believe they’re being held captive. After all, there's no other thought but unpleasant imaginations.
if they were to reunite with their mother and leave my side for her,
Who would want to let go of such a cute kid? No way,
The one who would be hurting the most is
There's no way they'd hide without saying anything or reaching out.
Even if Gloria tried to hold them back,
No, that possibility is almost none.
A foreboding feeling was swelling in my chest.
truly worried about them. There’s no way that expression was a lie.
she's probably not at Gloria's place.
Where has she disappeared to? Doesn't Gloria have any idea?
Detective, let me know if you figure anything out.
